name: Xie Lab
tagline_en: Host–Microbiome Systems Biology, Metabolic Health & AI-Enabled Discovery
tagline_zh: 宿主–微生物组系统生物学、代谢健康与AI驱动发现
intro_en: The Xie Lab investigates how host genes, microbial communities and bioactive molecules interact to shape metabolism, aging and disease. We integrate multi-omics, bioinformatics, mechanistic animal models and translational research.
intro_zh: 谢黎炜课题组聚焦宿主基因、肠道微生物群与生物活性分子如何共同调控代谢、衰老与疾病，融合多组学、生物信息学、动物模型及转化研究。
pi: Liwei Xie, Ph.D. / 谢黎炜 博士
address_en: Research Group for Gut Microbiome and Health, China
address_zh: 肠道微生态与健康研究团队，中国
pubmed_queries: (Xie L[Author]) AND (microbiota OR microbiome OR metabolism OR postbiotic)
